channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on utility unit - commercial way, 5th March
item.description:
Please cover this graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole, 5th March
item.description:
Brand new laid road 4/5 weeks ago ,new tarmac road was laid and potholes are already forming getting bigger ,these should be fixed asap.not exceptable for a newly laid road less than 5 weeks old.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-24, Iona Close, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign has been graffiti, 5th March
item.description:
Silver graffiti on Old Kent Road. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 725, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip in Chequers Way N13 6DA, 5th March
item.description:
This bundle of clothes etc has been dumped in Chequers Way near the junction with Pasteur Gardens

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pasteur Gardens, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaking water main. Permanent puddle and damage to pavement., 5th March
item.description:
Leaking water main. This has been a problem for at least 12 months. There is a permanent puddle and damage to pavement. The pavement is uneven. This has had a half hearted repair in the past but is still leaking and becoming more significant. Can you get Thames water to fix it Lewisham council? It’s a waste of water and makes the pavement treacherous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163-165, Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of cement, 5th March
item.description:
Bag of cement left on street. Very heavy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheathill Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bag of clothes, 5th March
item.description:
Someone has left this bag of clothes/textiles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Bermondsey Wall West, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sweeping, 5th March
item.description:
The street has not been swept for a while, and debris and rubbish are accumulating
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 5th March
item.description:
More rubbish dumped. Street is untidy and pigeons and seagulls making it worse. There is food waste in amongst the rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on corner, 5th March
item.description:
Obstruction on already narrow pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dogs constantly pooping outside 85 Southwark Park Road, 5th March
item.description:
Owners are allowed their dogs to keep pooping on the pavement outside 85 Southwark Park Road SE16 3TY. If you can please arrange for someone to clean it and also to spray the pick up the poo signs on the pavement please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa fly tipped on the street, 5th March
item.description:
This sofa was thrown from the balcony by one of the residents of Sherard House and dumped on Frampton park road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by residents of 54, 5th March
item.description:
Residents of 54 Newlands Park put some unwanted baby kit out on the street as too lazy to drive it to the tip. It has now been there two weeks which is a pretty poor show of neighbourliness. Can the council please have the fly tip team please collect. thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pestrian wait button not working., 5th March
item.description:
Keeps resetting after being pressed. Lights often stay green for traffic indefinitely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Hackney Road, Bethnal Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 5th March
item.description:
2 wheelchairs dumped on wellmeadow Road outside the care home likely to be dumped by the owners of the car home .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellmeadow Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tag, 5th March
item.description:
Tag on left side of next

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148-154, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 5th March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Way, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A black, wheeled rubbish bin has been flytipped on Leagrave St., near Hillstowe St corner, next to my house (8 Hillstowe St). It's not my bin and belongs in a differenet neighbourhood. It has '5 Mentmore Terrace' and 'Flat 1' written on it., 5th March
item.description:
It has been here a week or more.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillstowe Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and leaves and muck all squashed together, 5th March
item.description:
Bottles cans litter and leaves all stuck together. No litter picking for at least 2 weeks. It smells. Needs to be swept not just litter picking. Also litter scatter all the way up Selby Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorcycles, 5th March
item.description:
Abandoned scooters on Royston Field by the lower seat on the Sainsburys side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
